entries.definition:
نَمِيم namīm [n.; v. n.] the act of sowing dissension, calumny,
tale-bearing (68:11) هَمَّازٍ مَشَّاءٍ بِنَمِيمٍ a backbiter, slander-monger.

-nna [heavy nūn of corroboration (نون التوكيد الثقيلة)] (see نّ -n).
entries.definition_english:
نَمِيم namīm [n.; v. n.] the act of sowing dissension, calumny,
tale-bearing (68:11) هَمَّازٍ مَشَّاءٍ بِنَمِيمٍ a backbiter, slander-monger.

-nna [heavy nūn of corroboration (نون التوكيد الثقيلة)] (see نّ -n).

entries.definition:
n–h–w goal, end, termination; to end, to restrain, to forbid, to
abstain; to inform, to relate to; mind, discerning power, reason.

968
entries.definition_english:
n–h–w goal, end, termination; to end, to restrain, to forbid, to
abstain; to inform, to relate to; mind, discerning power, reason.

968

entries.definition:
Of this root, eight forms occur 56 times in the Qur’an: نَهَى nahā
24 times; نُهِيَ nuhiya eight times; يَتَنَاهَوْن yatanāhawn once; اِنْتَهَى
ʾintahā 16 times; نَاهُون nāhūn once; نُهَى nuhā twice; مُنْتَهَى muntahā
three times and مُنْتَهُون muntahūn once.

نَهَى nahā a [v. trans.] 1 to forbid, to prohibit (7:22) أَلَمْ أَنْهَكُمَا عَنْ
تِلْكُمَا الشَّجَرَةِ did I not forbid you from that tree? 2 to restrain, to
suppress, to hold back, to stop (79:40) وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِ وَنَهَى النَّفْسَ
عَنِ الْهَوَىٰ and as for anyone who feared the meeting with his Lord
and restrained himself from whimsical desires 3 to restrain from,
to ward off, to warn against (11:116) فَلَوْلَا كَانَ مِنَ الْقُرُونِ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ أُولُو
بَقِيَّةٍ يَنْهَوْنَ عَنِ الْفَسَادِ فِي الْأَرْضِ if only there had been, among the
generations before your time, people with a remnant [of good
traditions] to ward against corruption on the earth!

نُهِيَ nuhiya [pass. v.] to be forbidden to, to be prohibited from
(4:161) وَأَخْذِهِمُ الرِّبَا وَقَدْ نُهُوا عَنْهُ and their taking usury when they had
been forbidden it.

يَتَنَاهَى yatanāhā [imperf. of v. VI تَنَاهَى tanāhā, intrans.] to
forbid one another from, to prevent one another from, to restrain
one another from doing (5:79) كَانُوا لَا يَتَنَاهَوْنَ عَنْ مُنْكَرٍ فَعَلُوهُ they did
not prevent one another from any abomination they committed.

اِنْتَهَى ʾintahā [v. VIII intrans.] to desist, to cease, to hold back,
to abstain, to stop (8:38) إِنْ يَنْتَهُوا يُغْفَرْ لَهُمْ مَا قَدْ سَلَفَ if they desist
[from their unbelief] their past will be forgiven.

نَاهُون nāhūn [pl. of act. part. نَاهٍ nāhī] ones who forbid, ones
who denounce an action as forbidden, ones who admonish against
doing (9:112) الْآمِرُونَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَالنَّاهُونَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ those who command
goodness and forbid what is wrong.

نُهَى nuhā [n.] reasoning faculty, comprehension, discernment
(20:54) إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِأُولِي النُّهَىٰ in this there are truly signs for
those possessing reason.

مُنْتَهَى muntahā [v. n.; n. of place or time] ending, coming to an
end; place of ending, a terminus or limit; time of ending, a term, a
fixed term (79:42–4) يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ السَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَاهَا فِيمَ أَنْتَ مِنْ ذِكْرَاهَا إِلَىٰ
رَبِّكَ مُنْتَهَاهَا they ask you [Prophet] about the Hour: ‘When will it

969

969
